{{Quote|They have damaged us beyond repair, that is true. But I have a surprise being readied for those pirates. They will find the price of dealing with ''Subjugator'' to be more expensive than they can afford.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kolaff]], to [[Lira Wessex/Legends|Lira Wessex]]|<ref name="SF" />}}
The '''''Subjugator''''' was a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kolaff]]. [[Juren]] was the ship's [[Engineer/Legends|Chief Engineer]].

==History==
The ''Subjugator'' was deployed in the [[Relgim sector/Legends|Relgim sector]]. It was later sent to [[Kwenn Space Station/Legends|Kwenn Space Station]] by [[Lira Wessex/Legends|Lira]] and [[Denn Wessex]] to capture [[Walex Blissex/Legends|Walex Blissex]]. Blissex and a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] agents were captured, but managed to escape.<ref name="SF" />

It was [[Attack on the Subjugator|engaged]] by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] strike force codenamed [[Task Force Starfall]] and destroyed.<ref name="SF" />
